remarks: **Plans submitted and waiting on final approvals likely completed July/August.** Rare opportunity to build new in one of Westport's most sought-after neighborhoods. Set on approximately one acre on a quiet Coleytown side street, this property offers the ideal combination of privacy, natural surroundings, and convenience. Surrounded by established homes and just minutes from top-rated schools, downtown Westport, shopping, dining, beaches, and commuter routes, the location speaks for itself. The sellers have nearly completed the permitting process, and the property can be purchased with fully approved plans, allowing the next owner to move directly into the construction phase and avoid the time and uncertainty of approvals. The existing home is being sold as-is. A premier opportunity to create a custom home in an exceptional Westport setting. Rendering of home to be built.
